content_body:
Have you reserved that perfect North Georgia Cabin Rental and now are trying to figure out what you need to bring? Being prepared when coming to a mountain area is a sure must. All of our cabins are fully furnished, including linens, towels, paper products and soaps. Our cabins are also equipped with a Washer/dryer and detergent. Here is a list of a few items you may want to bring:

1. Don't forget your directions. Our directions are easy to follow and will get you to the cabin. Please DO NOT use GPS or MapQuest as they will get you lost here in the North Georgia Mountains. They may get you close but they do not have these rural mountain roads mapped out correctly. This is the most important item to make sure you have on hand.

2. Groceries ~ We have a nice Ingles grocery here in Blue Ridge, but you might get in so late that you don't feel like stopping at the store to pick up items. So bring some snacks that can tie you over till the next morning, or if you are planning on dining out a lot. We also provide a grocery service for a small fee - we can do the shopping for you. Just ask when making your reservation.

3. If you have reserved one of our Toccoa River Luxury Cabin Rentals, then you might want to bring tubes, rafts, anything that you might want to use in the water. The Toccoa River is very popular for trout fishing and tubing.

4. If you are looking forward to hiking in the North GA Mountains to chase waterfalls or do some geocaching, bring your hiking boots and snacks.

5. Our luxury cabin rentals are fully stocked with everything you need, especially in the kitchens, but if there is a favorite small appliance you just can't live without, go ahead and bring it. 

We want all of our guests to have a memorable experience with Cabin Rentals of Georiga. Sign up for our special offers to stay in touch with our coupons!
title: North Georgia Cabin Rental ~ What Items to Bring
